title: Fix booking form error message display

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the error that appears during the booking submission flow. Ensure that when a booking fails (validation error, backend error, or network issue), a clear, user-friendly error message is displayed in both Hindi and English. When a booking succeeds, show a proper success confirmation message instead of an error.

quotes: बुकिंग मे ही त्रुटि एरर मेसेज

acceptanceCriteria: Submitting the booking form does not show a spurious or unhandled error message on a successful booking
If a real error occurs (backend rejection, validation failure), a descriptive error message is displayed to the user in the current language (Hindi/English)
On successful booking submission, a success confirmation message is shown and no error message is visible
The BookingForm component handles Promise rejections and actor call failures gracefully without crashing
Error and success messages use the existing bilingual translations from translations.ts

requirements.text: Add or update bilingual translation strings in translations.ts for booking error and success states, covering: generic submission error, network/backend unavailable error, and booking confirmation success message — in both Hindi and English.

quotes: बुकिंग मे ही त्रुटि एरर मेसेज

acceptanceCriteria: translations.ts contains keys for bookingSuccess, bookingError, and bookingNetworkError in both Hindi and English
BookingForm renders these translated strings dynamically based on the active language context

requirements.text: Review the backend createBooking or equivalent booking mutation endpoint in main.mo to ensure it returns a proper error variant (e.g., #err) when booking creation fails, so the frontend can distinguish success from failure reliably.

quotes: बुकिंग मे ही त्रुटि एरर मेसेज

acceptanceCriteria: The booking creation function returns a Result type (#ok / #err) with a descriptive error message string on failure
The frontend receives a typed error response and can display the appropriate message to the user

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
Preserve existing bilingual (Hindi/English) support throughout all changes
nonGoals: Redesigning the booking form UI or layout
Changes to admin dashboard booking display logic
